accepted_candidates.label: AI Investor Update Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps founders turn weekly operating data into recurring investor updates and board-ready narratives.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: founder update drafting, board prep, and operating narrative packaging
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at recurring investor communication and company storytelling
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect metrics, draft update, review stakeholder feedback, refine next update
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Founders repeatedly struggle to convert raw company data into high-trust investor communication.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is not generic writing help; it is a recurring founder operating loop.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Customer Research Synthesizer
accepted_candidates.description: Aggregates support tickets, interviews, churn notes, and call transcripts into recurring customer insight packets.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: multi-source customer signal synthesis for product and GTM teams
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at turning repeated customer evidence into operating decisions
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect customer artifacts, extract patterns, publish insight packet, refine next cycle
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Teams repeatedly want synthesis across fragmented customer feedback channels, not just isolated transcript summaries.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: The value is in repeated operating synthesis, not one-off summarization.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI User Interview Analyst
accepted_candidates.description: Helps product teams run, tag, compare, and learn from repeated user interview cycles.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: interview pattern extraction and evidence organization
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated user research quality over time
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: run interview, tag themes, compare across interviews, update product questions
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated need for structured interview learning loops across product teams.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Interview work becomes valuable when it compounds across repeated cycles.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Sales Call Prep Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Prepares account context, risks, objections, and next-step plans before recurring sales calls.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: deal-context assembly and pre-call sales preparation
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated high-stakes sales preparation
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect account context, draft prep brief, run call, learn from outcome
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Revenue teams want recurring prep workflows around live calls, not just generic CRM note generation.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: The durable loop is pre-call preparation plus post-call learning.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Hiring Debrief Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Turns interview notes into consistent hiring debriefs, comparisons, and next-step recommendations.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: candidate evidence synthesis and hiring decision packaging
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated hiring decision quality and calibration
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect notes, synthesize candidate evidence, compare applicants, improve rubric next cycle
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Teams repeatedly struggle to turn scattered interview notes into high-signal, comparable hiring decisions.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Repeated hiring loops create enough specialization and mastery surface for a chip.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI RFP Response Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps B2B teams assemble, tailor, and learn from repeated RFP and security questionnaire responses.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: response drafting, knowledge retrieval, and enterprise packaging
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated enterprise response accuracy and speed
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: retrieve evidence, draft response, submit package, learn from procurement feedback
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated demand appears around high-friction enterprise response loops, especially where teams reuse prior answers.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is a recurring enterprise operating loop rather than one-off document generation.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Compliance Evidence Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Collects recurring audit artifacts, maps controls, and prepares evidence packets for compliance reviews.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: control mapping, evidence collection, and audit packet assembly
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated compliance evidence operations across audits
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect artifacts, map controls, prepare evidence packet, learn from auditor gaps
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated enterprise pain exists around turning scattered operational artifacts into reusable compliance evidence.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: The repeated loop is evidence readiness across multiple audits and reviews.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Incident Comms Coordinator
accepted_candidates.description: Coordinates recurring incident updates across customers, executives, and internal teams during outages and breaches.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: incident update drafting and stakeholder-specific communication management
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated incident communication quality under pressure
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect incident facts, draft stakeholder updates, send update, learn from postmortem feedback
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Teams repeatedly want help translating technical incident state into stakeholder-ready communication over many update cycles.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is a repeated operating domain in outages, not just a generic writing helper.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Reskilling Curriculum Builder
accepted_candidates.description: Designs recurring upskilling paths, practice loops, and progress reviews for people moving into AI-heavy work.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: curriculum assembly, practice sequencing, and progress review design
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated reskilling outcomes across learner cohorts
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: assess learner, assemble curriculum, review progress, adapt next learning cycle
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: There is repeated demand for structured AI upskilling pathways rather than ad hoc course lists.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: People want a repeated mastery path, not only one-time recommendations.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Partner Prospecting Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps teams find, brief, and sequence outreach to recurring integration and distribution partners.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: partner research, qualification, and outreach planning
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated partner development loops
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: research partner, draft outreach brief, run conversations, refine partner thesis
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Teams repeatedly treat partnership development like scattered spreadsheet work instead of a compounding operating loop.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is a recurring partner-development workflow with clear specialization.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI Support Escalation Analyst
accepted_candidates.description: Analyzes recurring support escalations to identify product, operations, and messaging fixes.
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated escalation handling and prevention over time
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect escalations, identify recurring patterns, propose fixes, review downstream impact
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Support teams repeatedly need synthesis over escalations, not only ticket-level replies.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: The repeated loop is escalation learning, not one-off ticket response.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: Distribution Signals Scout
accepted_candidates.description: Tracks recurring distribution opportunities across communities and channels.
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: scan channels, collect signals, share list, repeat
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Potential domain shape, but evidence and mastery are still thin.
classification_reasons: Has specialization intent but not enough mastery definition yet.

merged_candidates.label: Board Update Copilot
merged_candidates.description: Turns company metrics and notes into recurring board update packets.
merged_candidates.specialization_surface: board packet assembly and investor communication packaging
merged_candidates.mastery_surface: improving recurring board communication quality across cycles
merged_candidates.user_value_loop: gather metrics, draft board packet, send update, learn from board questions
merged_candidates.evidence_summary: Alias of the same recurring founder update domain from a second naming angle.
merged_candidates.raw_observation: Repeated board communication workflow, same core domain as investor updates.

merged_candidates.label: AI Agent Builder
merged_candidates.description: Tools that help people build AI agents faster.
merged_candidates.user_value_loop: define agent, scaffold system, evaluate behavior, iterate
merged_candidates.evidence_summary: Already represented in the maintained benchmark universe.

rejected_candidates.label: Shared Prompt Folder

rejected_candidates.label: B2B Founders

rejected_candidates.evidence_summary: Real audience segment but not a repeated operating domain by itself.
